mapper.sql: id, session_id, context_key, context_value, metadata::text AS metadata, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_memory_context (session_id, context_key, context_value, metadata) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{contextKey}, #{contextValue}, CAST(#{metadata} AS jsonb))
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM t_memory_context WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY context_key ASC
